scripts.setup:env: test -f .env && echo '.env already exists — skipped' || (cp .env.example .env && echo 'Created .env — add your GEMINI_API_KEY')
scripts.setup:prompt: test -f prompts/tailor-resume.prompt && echo 'prompts/tailor-resume.prompt exists' || echo 'Missing prompts/tailor-resume.prompt — create it or set GEMINI_PROMPT in .env'
scripts.setup: bun run setup:env && bun run setup:prompt
